title: ShowWindow Method, Spel Class
syntax: Sub ShowWindow (WindowID As SpelWindows, [, Parent As Form])
parameters:
WindowID	The ID of
		 the Epson RC+ 8.0 window to show.

Parent	Optional.
		 A .NET form that will be the parent of the window.
notes: When ServerOutOfProcess is False and your application is using .NET, you can use the Parent parameter to specify the .NET parent form for the window. Otherwise, you must omit the Parent parameter and use the ParentWindowHandle property to set the handle of the parent.
see_also:
HideWindow

RunDialog

ServerOutOfProcess

ShowWindow Example

VB
examples:
Sub btnShowIOMonitor_Click( _
       ByVal sender As System.Object, _
       ByVal e As System.EventArgs) _
       Handles btnShowIOMonitor.Click
    m_spel.ShowWindow(RCAPINet.SpelWindows.IOMonitor)
End Sub
